commands.review_summary:
The PR updates Windows QMD shim/package fallback resolution and OpenAI-compatible image response parsing to download URL-backed images through guarded provider HTTP, with related SDK docs and tests.

PR surface: Source +242, Tests +350, Docs 0, Config +1, Generated 0, Other +724. Total +1317 across 21 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection, without running the workflows locally: current main only parses `data[].b64_json`, and the current Windows shim parser skips quoted absolute entrypoints that are not `%~dp0`-relative. The PR body also supplies Windows runtime proof and local image-generation output.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The PR is automerge-opted and the blocking defects are concrete mechanical repairs that an automated fix pass can attempt before maintainer/security review of the final URL-download boundary.
